translation_findings.detail: ZH renders both 'ハウジングサービス' and 'ホスティングサービス' as '主机托管服务' (identical headings on two distinct JP terms). Definitions remain distinct so semantic meaning is preserved, but heading collision could confuse readers. Suggest renaming one (e.g. '机房托管服务' for housing, '主机托管服务' for hosting).
